Mission Pillars Record Coalition Donate
Doctrine

The Five Pillars.
The structure of the remedy.

Five institutional values. The center holds. Each pillar is a proof point for the doctrine.

01

Environmental

Food sovereignty, land stewardship, agriculture, and anti-food-apartheid infrastructure. Flagship: Lineage Farms — FarmBlock. FarmBlock Phase II urban agriculture feasibility study: 50+ cities surveyed.

Explore this pillar →
02

Economic

Business formation, government contracting, cooperative ownership, and circular economics. Doctrine: From survival to power. Building the economic infrastructure that sustains the lineage.

Explore this pillar →
03

Educational

Private education, STEM, emerging technologies, leadership, and lineage-centered curriculum. Flagship: McCartney Academy. Black-centered K–12 private school. Designed to produce institutional architects.

Explore this pillar →
04

Engagement

Civic education, public policy literacy, media, storytelling, and mobilization. Flagship: Block to the Boardroom. Training community members in governance and institutional management.

Explore this pillar →
05

Emancipated

The unfinished obligations of freedom. Documented obligations become policy research. Campaign: Restitution 246 research framework. 246 years documented. Disciplined methodology. Open record.

Explore this pillar →
E5 Enclave

Sovereign institutional infrastructure.
Founded 2024. Liberty City, Miami.
